channel.title: TOON 2026 (Token-Efficient Object Notation) Updates
channel.description: A JSON-superset data serialization format designed to reduce token usage and improve parsing efficiency for AI and LLM systems.

item.title: TOON 2026 (Token-Efficient Object Notation) Definition
item.description: A JSON-superset data serialization format designed to reduce token usage and improve parsing efficiency for AI and LLM systems.
